---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  contents: projects/*.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: custom
  template: projects-listing.ejs.md
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories, stars, project_lang, github_url]
  feed: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
